title: Stech Clarity-Driven Feedback Transformer (SCDFT)
description: Transform multiple raw, harsh, or emotional feedback items into clear, structured, manager-ready reports. Upload CSV (with flexible column names) or provide a JSON array. SCDFT automatically maps common column names (feedback, name, sender, etc.).

csvFile.title: CSV File (optional)
csvFile.description: Upload a CSV file. You can use your existing company CSV without renaming columns. If you use dynamic mapping, provide columnMapping and rejectionTemplate.

feedbacks.title: Feedback Array (optional)
feedbacks.description: Alternative to CSV: provide an array of feedback objects. All personalization fields are optional.

prefill.originalFeedback: This thing is a piece of crap. Fell apart in two weeks. DO NOT BUY THIS GARBAGE.

originalFeedback.title: Original Feedback
originalFeedback.description: The raw feedback, complaint, or evaluation text you want to refine.

originalSubject.title: Original Subject (optional)
originalSubject.description: Original feedback subject line. Never changed by SCDFT. Included for reference and ATS compatibility.

recipientName.title: Recipient Name (optional)
recipientName.description: Name of the recipient for personalization. SCDFT also recognizes: recipient, name, recipient_name.

senderName.title: Sender Name (optional)
senderName.description: Name of the sender to sign the feedback. SCDFT also recognizes: sender, sender_name.

recipientEmail.title: Recipient Email (optional)
recipientEmail.description: Recipient's email address. SCDFT also recognizes: email, recipient_email. Carried through to output for ATS compatibility.

columnMapping.title: Column Mapping (for CSV)
columnMapping.description: Map placeholders to CSV column names. Example: { "name": "Full Name", "role": "Job Title" }

rejectionTemplate.title: Rejection Template (for CSV)
rejectionTemplate.description: Template with placeholders like {name}, {role}. Required if columnMapping is provided.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Number of feedback items to process simultaneously (1-20).

timeout.title: Timeout (seconds)
timeout.description: Max wait time per feedback request.
